zh.Stoke Doyley, Northamptonshire, England: 英國哈普爾比曉普斯托可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton於1290年出生在英國哈普爾比曉普斯托可時，他的父親Sir John d’Oyly II62歲，母親Johanna Knightely50歲。他於1313年與Margaret de Hastings結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年在英國斯塔福爾享年46歲。

zh-hans.Stoke Doyley, Northamptonshire, England: 英国哈普爾比曉普斯托可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton于1290年出生在英国哈普爾比曉普斯托可时，他的父亲Sir John d’Oyly II62岁，母亲Johanna Knightely50岁。他于1313年与Margaret de Hastings结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1336年在英国斯塔福爾享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Oyley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Olley with fused Old French preposition d' ‘from’.

variants.name: Olley
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of   Oley   2, a habitational name of Norman origin, from any of the five places called Ouilly in Calvados, France.

variants.name: Dilley
meanings: English: possibly a pet form of an unrecorded Old English personal name Dylla, found as the first element in the placenames Dillington (in the former Huntingdonshire) and Dilton (in Wiltshire). The name may sometimes have been confused with Doyley and Dolley (see Olley ).
German: variant of   Dilly   or a surname of French origin, an altered form of   Delay  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Dilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton was born in 1290, in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir John d’Oyly II, was 62 and his mother, Johanna Knightely, was 50. He married Margaret de Hastings in 1313. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1336, in Staffordshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton est né en 1290, à Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John d’Oyly II, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Johanna Knightely, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Hastings en 1313. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1336, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton 1290 in Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John d’Oyly II 62 und seine Mutter Johanna Knightely 50. Er hat 1313 Margaret de Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1336 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton è nato il nel 1290 nel Bishopstoke, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John d’Oyly II, aveva 62 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Knightely, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Hastings nel 1313. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1336, nel Staffordshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア

ja.Stoke Doyley, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストク
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Rantonが1290年にイギリスハンプシュアイアビショプストクで生まれた時，父Sir John d’Oyly IIは62歳，母Johanna Knightelyは50歳であった。1313年にMargaret de Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1336年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton(이)가 1290년 영국 함프실르 비숍스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John d’Oyly II(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Knightely(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1313년 Margaret de Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton nasceu em 1290, em Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John d’Oyly II, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Knightely, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Hastings em 1313. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1336, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton родился в 1290 г. в местности бишопсток, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John d’Oyly II было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Knightely, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Hastings в 1313 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1336 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas d'Oyley Lord of Ranton nació en 1290, en Bishopstoke, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John d’Oyly II, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Johanna Knightely, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Margaret de Hastings en 1313. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1336, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
